name: Jupyter Notebook Asset
description: Execute a Jupyter notebook as a Dagster asset using Papermill. Injects parameters into a tagged cell, saves the fully-executed notebook as an artifact, and surfaces execution metadata in the Dagster UI.
title: JupyterNotebookAssetComponent

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

notebook_path.description: Path to the input .ipynb file to execute. Supports {{ project_root }} template substitution.

output_path.description: Path where the executed notebook (with outputs) will be saved. Defaults to {notebook_stem}_executed_{date}.ipynb in the same directory as the input notebook.

parameters.description: Parameters to inject into the notebook's tagged parameters cell. Overrides any defaults set in the cell.

kernel_name.description: Jupyter kernel to use for execution (e.g. 'python3'). When null, papermill uses the kernel recorded in the notebook metadata.

execution_timeout.description: Maximum number of seconds allowed per cell. Set to -1 to disable the per-cell timeout.

working_dir.description: Working directory for notebook execution. When null, the notebook runs in the directory that contains it.

env_vars.description: Environment variables made available to the notebook kernel via os.environ before execution begins.

store_output_ipynb.description: Whether to log the path of the executed notebook to the Dagster event log.

description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on.
